index.title: Dashboard
index.descriptionMonth: Review income, expenses, and account balances for {{period}}.
index.descriptionYear: Review annual income and expenses for {{period}}.

monthlySummary.title: Monthly Summary
monthlySummary.description: Income, expenses, and net cash flow are shown by currency for this month.
monthlySummary.empty: No income or expense data for this month.

accountSummary.title: Account Summary
accountSummary.description: Balances are calculated from opening balances and transactions through the end of the selected month. Credit cards and payment accounts show outstanding or pending balances.
accountSummary.name: Account Name

categoryExpenses.title: Expenses by Category
categoryExpenses.description: This month's expenses are aggregated by category.
categoryExpenses.empty: No expense data for this month.

monthlyTrend.title: Monthly Trend
monthlyTrend.description: Income, expenses, and net cash flow for the last six months.
monthlyTrend.empty: No income or expense data for this month.

yearly.preparingDescription: Period selection and URLs already support annual views. Annual aggregation will be added in the next phase.
yearly.summaryDescription: Income, expenses, and net cash flow for the selected year are shown by currency.
yearly.summaryEmpty: No income or expense data for this year.
yearly.trendDescription: Income, expenses, and net cash flow from January through December of the selected year.
yearly.categoryDescription: Expenses for the selected year are aggregated by category and currency.
yearly.categoryEmpty: No category expense data for this year.

netWorth.title: Daily Assets, Liabilities & Net Worth
netWorth.description: Accounts included in net worth are aggregated for each balance date in {{period}}. Liabilities are shown as positive amounts, and net worth is total assets minus total liabilities.
netWorth.emptyAccounts: No accounts are available for a net worth trend.
netWorth.emptyPeriod: No net worth trend data for this period.

assetHistory.title: Long-Term Money Forward Total Assets
assetHistory.description: History saved from Money Forward asset history CSV files and daily balance imports. Official total assets and asset classes are shown without allocating them to individual accounts.

dailySnapshot.title: Today's Money Forward Update
dailySnapshot.description: Refresh Money Forward, then use the existing one-click export and Official Balances & Valuations import.

summary.latestImport: Account balances acquired today: {{count}} · Last import: {{date}}

coverage.title: Last 7 Days
coverage.started: Daily records started on {{date}}. Earlier dates do not require acquisition. After that date, a day is complete when all target accounts and the total assets summary are recorded.
coverage.notStarted: Daily records have not started yet. Dates before the first import do not require acquisition. After records begin, a day is complete when all target accounts and the total assets summary are recorded.

accounts.title: Account Update Status
accounts.description: Select an account to review its balance history or position valuations.

failures.title: Unresolved Import Failures in the Last 7 Days
failures.description: This warning clears when a later import from the same source succeeds or reaches review status.

weeklyImport.title: Weekly JRE POINT & Mobile Suica Update
weeklyImport.description: Period: {{start}}–{{end}}. Complete login and SMS verification yourself, then upload the acquired files through the existing import flow.

jre_point.label: JRE POINT
jre_point.description: After login and SMS verification, export and import the point history.

mobile_suica.label: Mobile Suica
mobile_suica.description: Download the usage history PDF and import it directly.

monthlyReport.title: Monthly Report for {{period}}
monthlyReport.description: Compare with the previous month and the same month last year, review spending patterns, and identify data that needs attention.

comparison.empty: No income or expense data for this month or its comparison periods.
comparison.title: Income & Expense Comparison

activity.title: Activity
activity.empty: No included transactions for this month.

netWorth.title: Net Worth Change
netWorth.description: Compares the first and last saved balance dates in this month.
netWorth.empty: No balance data is available for comparison.
netWorth.singleDay: Cannot compare with only one balance date

merchants.title: Top 5 Spending Destinations
merchants.empty: No expense data for this month.

quality.title: Data Quality
quality.description: Review these items before finalizing the figures.

categoryFactors.title: Category Mix & Changes from Last Month
categoryFactors.description: Compare included expenses by currency. Select a category or details button to review its transactions.
categoryFactors.empty: No category expenses for this month or the previous month.

closing.title: Monthly Close
closing.reviewHelpLabel: Difference between account and report review
closing.reviewHelp: Account review confirms that statements, balances, and valuations from each financial institution are complete. Report review is the final check of categories, unconfirmed transactions, income and expenses, net worth, and the report as a whole. Both are required before closing the month.
closing.description: Confirm delayed card charges and investment contributions by account before closing this month.
closing.changedNotice: Transactions, balances, valuations, or account settings changed after review. Check the account status and review the monthly report again.

accounts.title: Month-End Account Review
accounts.help: This records that you compared the financial institution's data with the app's transactions, balances, and valuations and found no delayed data remaining for the month. If account data changes afterward, another review is required.
accounts.description: Select an account name to review its transactions for the month.
accounts.closedSummaryHint: Changes after closing are detected automatically, and account details reappear when needed.
accounts.empty: No target accounts. Enable Monthly close review required in account settings.
accounts.changed: This account's data changed after confirmation

guides.creditCard: Transactions, billed amount, phone charges, and other recurring charges are complete through month end
guides.securities: Contributions, cash movements, month-end valuation, and position details are reflected
guides.bank: Transactions and month-end balance are reflected with no pending items remaining
guides.eMoney: Payments, charges, point redemptions, and balance are reflected through month end
guides.point: Point earnings, redemptions, charge exchanges, and balance are reflected through month end
guides.default: Transactions and balance are reflected through the end of the selected month

note.label: Monthly Note
note.placeholder: Record pending transactions or notes about this month
